title: Best tech gifts for her in 2025
author: Electriz TechTalk
excerpt: It's that time of year again. You know, when we're all racking our brains looking for the perfect prezzie. And if you're really stuck trying to find...
content:
It's that time of year again. You know, when we're all racking our brains looking for the perfect prezzie. And if you're really stuck trying to find something she'll like, then you've come to the right place.

That's because we've rounded up a few amazing gift ideas that'll have your mum, sister, partner, or bestie beaming on Christmas morning. Trust us, these gadgets are way better than flowers or chocolates!

## Dyson Airwrap I.D. Straight + Wavy Multi-Styler & Dryer

We're not just saying it -- the Dyson Airwrap is now the holy grail of hair tools. A lot of similar gadgets use extreme heat to get the job done. But not here. Instead, it uses clever airflow tech to style your locks without frying your hair. This version comes with attachments for both straight and wavy looks, alongside a handy dryer function. It's basically a full salon in one package. And that amber silk and pink champagne finish? Gorgeous.

**Why it's gift-worthy:** It's the ultimate upgrade for anyone who loves trying out a new style or two.

## Shark FacialPro Glow + DePuffi At Home Facial

Give them the gift of glowing skin! This smart little device combines cooling and warming treatments to help reduce puffiness, boost circulation and leave your face looking fresh. It's perfect when you want a pamper sesh, but don't have the time -- or cash -- for regular spa trips. You'll find it easy to use and super relaxing. Those self-care Sundays are about to get even better.

**Why it's gift-worthy:** You'll turn their everyday skincare routine into a luxury experience.

## HP OmniBook 5 14" Laptop

This laptop handles multitasking better than a workshop full of elves. The Snapdragon processor makes it lightning fast and efficient. Even when you've got a million tabs open for a spot of internet shopping. Throw in a 512GB SSD, and there's plenty of space for files, apps and photos.

**Why it's gift-worthy:** Its 14" display is crisp and clear, making their fave festive flicks look epic.

## Amazon Kindle Paperwhite 7" eReader

There's a big debate over physical and digital books nowadays. But for the bookworm in your life, the Kindle Paperwhite is a must-read. The 7" glare-free display looks a lot like real paper, even in bright sunlight. And an adjustable warm light makes reading comfy on your eyes day or night. Plus, with 16GB of storage, there's space for literally thousands of books.

**Why it's gift-worthy:** The battery lasts for weeks on a single charge.

## Anker Soundcore Sleep A20 Earbuds

Don't sleep on Anker's Soundcore. These buds are made for bedtime bliss. They block out any annoying noise (like your housemate returning late from the club) and play soothing sounds to help you drift off faster. And because they're lightweight and comfy, they'll stay put all night without pressing on your ears.

**Why it's gift-worthy:** Let's be honest, a solid 8 hours of sleep is the best gift of all!
